name: @smartlangguard/windows-hook
description: SmartLangGuard Windows Keyboard Hook - OS-level low-level keystroke hook for auto-correcting keyboard layout mistakes in real time across all applications

scripts.build: cd KeyHook && dotnet publish -c Release --self-contained false -o ../dist
scripts.build:standalone: cd KeyHook && dotnet publish -c Release --self-contained true -o ../dist-standalone -p:PublishSingleFile=true

author: SmartLangGuard <hello@smartlangguard.com>
